race.description: Latitude Liquor Wholesalers Champs Preview Hcp (C4)
race.comment: NIMBLE STAR (5) third-up for this and comes out of a strong rating contest after finishing a close-up tenth over 1200m at Randwick behind Fingers Hunter in Highway class. Can race closer with the claim and score a well-deserved victory. SPEEDY HENRY (8) deep into the preparation and back in trip with the blinkers and tongue-tie coming off. Races best with the runs spaced and top form is over this distance range. KRANICH (2) underrated gelding with his hoof on the till third-up. Won well in town over 1300m in Highway class last August and will take holding out from the low draw. WASTED DAYS (6) poorly drawn at his last two outings and today is no different. Tongue-tie goes on with the big weight drop and can make rapid improvement with Mathew Cahill aboard. Respect.
